title: Update architecture spec from decision
rationale: This decision indicates durable architecture guidance that should stay documented.
proposed_summary: Task packets need machine-readable extensible structure; storing under .sidecar/tasks with zod validation decouples task orchestration from SQLite task rows.
proposed_patch_text:
## Constraints
- Task packets need machine-readable extensible structure; storing under .sidecar/tasks with zod validation decouples task orchestration from SQLite task rows.
